chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR. C.P.No.D- 1580 of 2022. 1.For orders on o/obj. at Flag.A. 2.For Hearing of main case. - 08.11.2023. Mr.Abdul Raheem Mahar Advocate for petitioner. Mr.Ghulam Mustafa Abro AAG. - A written statement has been submitted on behalf of the respondent No.3, which inter alia, reflects that the petitioner’s father expired during the service on 2009 but the petitioner did not approach the competent authority seeking his appointment against deceased quota. The relevant paragraph thereof reads as follows:- “That at the time of his father’s death the petitioner was minor and has become mature in the year 2021 but as per record of this office the petitioner has not applied for appointment against deceased quota by virtue of his father’s death during service. Even, approximately, the two years have also been passed. In view of above, this Honourable Court may be pleased to direct the petitioner to provide relevant record including his personal file for submission of the same to the Administrative Department for approval of his appointment against deceased quota.” In response, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner would make an appropriate application in the matter and produce the relevant record, and would be satisfied if the same is considered and the matter processed in accordance with law through a speaking order. Learned AAG does not oppose to his suggestion. As such, the petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Akber.
